programme.title: BKFC 49: Slaveski vs. Lindsey
programme.desc: Gorjan Slaveski vs. Jake Lindsey, welterweight championship bout; Bryce Henry vs. Tom Shoaff, lightweight. From Miami-Dade Fairgrounds in Miami-Dade County, Fla.

programme.title: BKFC 53
programme.desc: From Colonial Life Arena, Columbia, S.C. on Nov. 3, 2023.

programme.title: BKFC 54
programme.desc: Rosen Dimitrov vs. Todor Zhelyazkov, middleweight; Georgi Valentinov vs. Bojan Kosendar, middleweight. From Arena Sofia in Sofia, Bulgaria. From Nov. 17, 2023.

programme.title: The Bare Knuckle Show
programme.desc: Host Brian Soscia discusses combat sporting news, exclusive BKFC content, interviews & more from the past month.

programme.title: Bellator MMA
programme.desc: All the classic mixed martial arts and kickboxing action from Bellator, featuring some of the best fighters in the world.

programme.title: Bellator MMA
programme.desc: Cheick Kongo takes on Sergei Kharitonov in the main event from Sioux Falls, S.D., Aug. 8, 2021.

programme.title: No Gamble, No Future
programme.desc: Eric Persson, Jean-Robert Bellande, Patrik Antonius, Sean Perry, Lynne Ji, Maria Ho, Eli Elezra, Jimmy D'Ambrosio, Dylan DeStefano, Nick Schulman, Krish Menon, David Williams, Alan Keating and Boston Rob Mariano play a variety of stakes.

programme.title: Coach and Company
programme.desc: Jonathan Coachman hosts this no-holds-barred daily sports talk show. "The Coach" leads dynamic discussions with a rotating cast of all-star analysts and sports insiders.

programme.title: TCL Team Boxing League
programme.desc: From Red Owl Boxing Arena in Houston.

programme.title: Bare Knuckle Boxing
programme.desc: From Stockyards Event Center in Denver, Colorado.

programme.desc: From Gold Coast Sports & Leisure Center in Gold Coast, Australia.

programme.title: BKFC Fight Night Hollywood: Lane vs. Henry, Prelims
programme.desc: Former champion Julian Lane battles Bryce Henry at BKFC Hollywood. From Hard Rock Hotel & Casino in Hollywood, Fla.

programme.title: BKFC KnuckleMania VI
programme.desc: Ben Rothwell vs. Andrei Arlovski, heavyweight title bout; Lorenzo Hunt vs. Yoel Romero, heavyweight.

programme.title: BKFC 36
programme.desc: From Feb. 24, 2023. Features Alan Belcher vs. Arnold Adams for BKFC heavyweight championship, plus James Lilley vs. Bobby Taylor in bare-knuckle boxing action from Kenner, La.

programme.title: BKFC 39
programme.desc: March 24, 2023. Features Reggie Barnett Jr. defending BKFC bantamweight title against Daniel Alvarez, plus Britain Hart vs. Jenny Clausius for BKFC women's strawweight title from Norfolk, Virginia.

programme.title: Bellator Champions Series
programme.desc: Corey Anderson vs. Karl Moore from Northern Ireland.

programme.title: Bellator Champions Series
programme.desc: Ramazan Kuramagomedov vs. Jason Jackson from Ireland.

programme.title: Bellator Champions Series
programme.desc: Championship between Usman Nurmagomedov and Alexandr Shabliy headlines the event.

programme.title: Bellator MMA
programme.desc: Former light heavyweight champion, Phil Davis (21-5) takes on Yoel Romero (13-5) who makes his Bellator debut. From Sept. 18, 2021 at the SAP Center in San Jose, Calif.

programme.title: Bellator MMA
programme.desc: Bellator MMA returns to London with a rematch between former world champion No. 1 ranked Douglas Lima and Michael Page. Also featured: top featherweights Leah McCourt and Jessica Borga.

programme.title: Warriors Cup
programme.desc: From April 26, 2025, at Melrose Ballroom in Queens, N.Y.

programme.desc: Featuring fighters from around the world competing in the sport of bare-knuckle boxing.

programme.title: PFL Vault: Elbows
programme.desc: Back when elbows were allowed, WSOF fighters made ample use of such a tool, and delivered some thrilling TKOs.

programme.title: PFL Vault
programme.desc: Tap, Nap or Snap; the best submissions in the PFL and WSOF featuring Marlon Moraes, Magomed Magomedkerimov and Natan Schulte.

programme.desc: Boxing in its purest form, with no gloves and hands are wrapped only.

programme.desc: Kai Stewart vs. Tommy Strydom, featherweight championship; Hannah Rankin vs. Jessica Borga, women's featherweight championship. From Dubai Tennis Stadium in Dubai, U.A.E.

programme.desc: Teton County SAR faces its toughest day yet: a lost hiker, a snowmobile crash, and an avalanche.

programme.sub-title: Skimboards Are Cool; Skimboard Hovercrafts Are Way Cooler
programme.desc: I built a skimboard that glides on a bed of air. The best part? A beach and ocean are 100% optional.

programme.sub-title: I Made a Houseboat Out of Basic Car Camping Gear
programme.desc: It turns out it’s way easier and cheaper to build your own floating home than I ever imagined.

programme.desc: Sucking at any given sport can be frustrating; sucking at navigating the backcountry can be terrifying.

programme.desc: Everything about kayaking appeals to Paddy, except one thing: the kayak.
